sutta: 8 the buddha said monks possessed her 5 qualities the way of an elder monk is not to the advantage of many folk is not for the happiness of many folk is not for the good of many for it is to the harm and ill of devas and men of what 5 there is the elder time honored and long gone forth well known renowned with a great following of householders and those gone forth a receiver of the requisites the robe arms lodging and medicines for sickness who is much learned and has a retentive and well-stored mind and those dharmas lovely in the beginning lovely in the middle lovely in the end are by him much hurt remembered verbally recited carefully considered in the mind thoroughly understood in theory but he is a wrong viewer with a perverted vision he turns many he turns away many folk from sat dhamma and sets them in what is not saddam which is true dharma thus though he be an elder time honored and long gone forth so through him they fall into the way of wrong views through the elder though the elder be well known renowned with a great following of householders and those gone forth through him they fall into the way of wrong views though the elder be a receiver of the requisites the rope arms lodging and medicines etc through him they fall into the way of wrong views though the elder be learned and has a retentive and well-stored mind and those dharmas by him are much heard remembered verbally recited carefully considered in the mind thoroughly understood in theory through him they fall into the way of wrong views monks possess of these 5 qualities the way of an elder is not to the advantage of manifold monks possessed of 5 qualities the way of an elder is to the advantage of meaningful is for the happiness of many folk for the good of many for it is to the advantage and happiness of devas and men of what 5 similarly the the suta repeats with all these qualities of the elder namely that the first 1 he's long gone forth well known renowned with a great following the second 1 that he receives much requisites the third that he is very much learned and the dharmas are well well remembered by him carefully considered in the mind thoroughly understood in theory and then he has right view and because he has right view he leads many people into the true dharma saddam as the end of the sutala now
commentary:
this suta is quite interesting this utah is saying that sometimes you can or probably the buddha meant that in the future after the buddhist buddha has passed to nibana there would be such a senior manga with a great following and well known and he's very much learned in the dhamma and in spite of that he has wrong view turns people away from the true dharma this dhamma is very important why does the buddha refer to saddam true dhamma this implies that there is false dharma dharma is the sutas the teachings and discourses of the buddha so the true dharma is the original sutas the original discourses of the buddha and if we investigate we find that that is to be found in the earliest 4 nikayas the diga nikaya manjima because these are very consistent there is no contradiction and later dhamma later teachings there is contradiction that is why sometimes like like now are there so many books uh available and some are not the original teachings of the buddha the teachings that contradict the original sutas that is why even though among can be very well learned very well he knows the tripitaka that we itaka's very well yet he can have wrong view and so because of that they have to be very careful as i've read before in algodra nikaya 4.180 the buddha said that in the future if any monk says that such and such is the teachings of the buddha then without welcoming and without scorning his words we should compare what he says to be the teachings of the buddha with the sutas that means the original phonikayas and the vinaya the disciplinary code of the monks and if it is uh in line now with the sutas and vinaya we can accept it but if it contradicts this and vinaya then we should check it out now it is not the teachings of the buddha that is what the buddha's said now in angular 4.180 so from this we have to be very careful even a very famous manga can have wrong view this is what is meant in the utah
